help.title: Help
help.intro: Barista Log saves everything on this device first. Here's the usual flow.

recipe.title: Record a new recipe
steps: Tap New (＋) in the bottom bar and pick Espresso or Brew.
Optionally choose a bean and water profile — add them first if you haven't (see below).
Pick your grinder and enter the grind setting in clicks. Use the Grind converter if you're dialing on a different grinder.
Enter dose in and yield / water out — the ratio is calculated automatically. For espresso the yield is what you weigh in the cup at the end; for brew it's the total water you pour in.
For Brew, build the pour schedule step by step (bloom, pours, agitation) with water and time, then tap Apply totals.
Optionally rate it and add flavors/tags now, or log it after brewing.
Tap Save. Your newest recipe appears on Home by default.

brewing.title: Brew & log a cup
steps: Open a brew recipe and tap Brew for the guided timer.
The screen stays awake and beeps/vibrates as each step starts.
When done, tap Log this brew to rate it and save it to History.
Review past cups in History, and use Compare to see what changed between days.

beans.title: Add beans
steps: Open Beans in the bottom bar, then tap Add.
Enter name, roaster, origin, process and roast date.
Saved beans show up in the bean picker when you create a recipe.

water.title: Add water profiles
steps: Beans → Water profiles tab → Add.
Name it (e.g. Third Wave Water, or Tap) and add supplier and TDS / GH / KH if you know them.
Select it on a recipe to track how water changes the cup.

grinder.title: Grinders & conversion
steps: Beans → Grinders tab. Popular grinders are preloaded; add your own with its microns-per-click.
Use the converter to translate a setting from one grinder to another — it's a starting point, not exact.
Grinders marked “estimate” have approximate values; adjust a few clicks and taste.

sync.title: Backup & sync
steps: Settings → Data: export or import a JSON backup any time.
Optionally connect Supabase and sign in to back up to the cloud and restore on another device.

home.empty: No recipes yet. Brew your first one!

play.title: Brew
play.noSteps: This recipe has no pour schedule. Add steps to use guided brewing.

grinder.title: Grinders
grinder.disclaimer: Starting point only — not exact. Burrs, wear and conical-vs-flat geometry differ. Expect to adjust 1–3 clicks and taste.
grinder.roughWarning: Different burr type (conical ↔ flat): the cup may differ even at the same micron size.
grinder.estimatedWarning: This grinder's microns-per-click is a rough estimate (stepless or sparsely documented). Treat the result loosely.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cloudIntro: Barista Log works fully offline. Power users can connect Supabase to back up and sync across devices.
settings.syncOffline: Offline — will sync when back online
settings.signUpCheckEmail: Account created. Check your email if confirmation is required, then sign in.
settings.localFirstNote: Your data is saved on this device first; the cloud is a backup you can restore on another device.
